items.title: [正面] Really fun slay the spire gatcha game highly recom...
items.summary: Really fun slay the spire gatcha game highly recommend if you like slay the spire

items.title: [正面] If you liked Slay the Spire, you'll probably like ...
items.summary:
If you liked Slay the Spire, you'll probably like this. The story, although translated through ChatGPT, is really good, especially if you're a fan of Lovecraftian horror. All of the illustrations are brilliantly done, and you can get more than enough gacha currency to guarantee whatever the current banner character is just by playing the game and progressing through the story.

The P2W factor is low because all of the leaderboard content is either balanced pvp (Traphase) or the rewards are so trivial that there's really no reason to be a juicer. I actually did spend some (~$200) money in this game so far, and have discovered that I have absolutely nothing worthwhile to really spend the currency on, so I guess I'm just supporting the developers. No regrets there. 

I really hope that if the game generates enough revenue they'll run all the text through a higher version of GPT. I'm getting used to seeing characters randomly switching genders from one line of dialogue to the next, but it really kind of takes you out of the experience.

items.title: [正面] Translations aside, everything is done really well...
items.summary: Translations aside, everything is done really well. The music and sound effects all fit the vibe at any given moment and the story is engaging. the combat feels a bit like slay the spire but with a lot more control. Over all 10/10 would recommend.

items.title: [正面]  Slay the spire gacha with a live pre balanced pvp...
items.summary: Slay the spire gacha with a live pre balanced pvp mode separate from the pve mode where you can use the characters you've attained to play without limit and win resources every match to summon pulls from pve mode. tldr, the 1st gacha ive ever seen that respects your time and money with insane amounts of content thats varied and lets you earn and upgrade for free, the rates are already baseline 20x better math wise for 5stars and you feel it. I've played BDO, ESO, Neverwinter, every hoyo game and many other mmos to high tier endgame and this somehow blows them all out of the water when it comes to respecting your time and money. Mad respect

items.title:
[正面] 번역이 좀 별로긴한데 재밌음. 스토리도 꽤...괜찮은듯? 
대화 스킵 관련해서 약간 불편함...
items.summary:
번역이 좀 별로긴한데 재밌음. 스토리도 꽤...괜찮은듯? 
대화 스킵 관련해서 약간 불편함이 있음. 대화 텍스트가 출력 중에 클릭하면 출력 완료하고 한 번 더 클릭하면 다음 텍스트로 넘어가는  편의성이 추가되면 좋을듯. 지금은 출력 완료될때까지 기다려야 됨.
모바일 버전 없나 싶네요. 틈틈히 하면 괜찮을 것 같은 게임. 아 근데 또 그러면 은근 호흡이 길어서 불편할지도?
